name: 威科先行
description: Built on Wolters Kluwer China's authoritative and real-time legal database, MCP service facilitates diverse search capabilities such as semantic and keyword retrieval.
description_zh: 威科先行依托全面、准确、及时更新的法规、案例等法律数据研发的MCP服务，支持语义检索、关键词检索等场景。
description_en: Built on Wolters Kluwer China’s authoritative and real-time legal database,  MCP service facilitates diverse search capabilities such as semantic and keyword retrieval.
examples_zh: 在北京，根据近三年的案例观点，股权激励纠纷是否属于劳动争议？
北上深关于“未约定竞业限制经济补偿时用人单位支付标准”的规定
examples_en: In Beijing, according to the case view of the past three years, is the equity incentive dispute a labor dispute?
Provisions of Beijing, Shanghai and Shenzhen on "Payment Standards for Employers when Economic Compensation for Non-competitive Restrictions is Not Agreed"
